reviews.review_description: It’s back finally I was playing for hours and I just checked and I got a response from a developer so now I can finally look at all my cosmetics and play horror. My favourite part after I figured out that the game stopped getting updates. I started playing the game for hours and wondering around. ￼

Hi! So i LOVE playing Bad Tag but their is a few problems with the game that i don't know if they will be fixed. 1: The game is stuck on the Halloween update. 2: The Monkes hands are really glitchy when moving cuz i don't know if it's a problem with the Gorilla Loco-Motion on the game. 3: The servers are completely DEAD and i can't even join a code at all. 4: The game will randomly give me a voice chat warning when i didn't even say anything bad. Owner, If your reading this, Fix the game up a bit and use the information i said ok? I'm not forcing or demanding you, Just a few things ya need to fix, Although i love this game!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review and for pointing this out.

A lot of what you said is valid. We’re still working on 1.0 right now, and it’s not just a small patch, it’s pretty much a whole new Bad Tag game.

Still, we appreciate you saying this and pointing the issues out. Thanks for supporting the game.

reviews.review_description:
The BEST horror slop game out there from 2022-2024, I miss the times…

People don’t play the game anymore….

I started the Game and i got in a Server No one was there maybe cause im ON the quest1. But If there are ppl Play this and have a Quest 1 IT would be cool If people Download it on their Quest 1 and Play.
I’m so glad it’s back now with bad rooms

developer_response.body:
We're happy to hear that !
There is always more coming soon so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: "I love this game it has great maps, A great community and lost of other great stuff". "But, When i bought a mod menu for $4.99 it paid and said it worked but i didnt get the mod menu i restarted my game and deleted and reinstalled the app but still nothing. Please tell me how to fix this im desprate!

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for pointing this out.

If it charged you and you still didn’t get it, then yeah that’s a problem. Since you already tried restarting and reinstalling, there might be an issue with the purchase not applying right.

Email us at beyondillusionstudios0@gmail.com with your username and proof of purchase, and we’ll look into it.

reviews.review_description: I had 3 mod menus but I don’t have it anymore  so I’m am very sad but the game is or was good but all my cosmetics are gone I had something that was not going to Return￼ but the start of 2025 it was the best

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for pointing this out.

If your mod menus and cosmetics are missing, that’s a serious issue. We’re sorry about that. Please email us at beyondillusionstudios0@gmail.com with your username and proof of purchase so we can look into it and see what happened.

Thanks for letting us know.

reviews.review_description: first time i've played since release and was sad and shocked to see that there was 0 active players even thought the rest of the reviews were in the 5 month radius, it breaks my heart to see one of the first and best games i've ever played on vr to have 0 active players. I really hope they can make this game popular again, just like the old bat tag😭

reviews.review_title: Omg!This was, and isn't the best fangame
reviews.review_description: This game is back on the store and servers work again but I was kinda excited for mediocre tag I kinda think coz is a better dev than lemming.🫩 I thought this game would be, like, a game? Yk. 8 months later btw, NO CONTENT HAS BEEN ADDED TO THE GAME EXCEPT FOR PURCHASABLE ITEMS AND ONE CRAPPY HORROR LEVEL.every time they "update" the game, I get excited thinking it's something, then getting ultimately disappointed whenever I load into the game. Pls make it better I'm begging u.GIVE ME MY $100 DOLLARS BACK. Thank u devs! I am glad that the real bad tag is back and I look forward to going back to playing this game every day!

developer_response.body: Hi chillstare! This is the new owner of BadTag! I’m really sorry you ended up losing money to the previous team and studio, what happened wasn’t okay. We’re working on a major update, and when it comes out we’ll make sure you get back what you originally paid for. I’ve also brought Coz back as the Game Director for BadTag, and from here on out Bad Tag won’t have mod menus, shady payments, or anything like that. We’re putting the community first, always. If you want to talk with us or let us know exactly what you lost, you can join our Discord here and dm J2B: https://discord.gg/CBUSDBgJ3Y
